Drevlyada League

Mentions Timeline (2 articles)
3305-02-28
Conflict in Drevlyada Resolved
The Drevlyada conflict ends abruptly when both General Kendrick and Marshal Cooper are executed by their own lieutenants for causing excessive casualties, with both factions agreeing to honour commitments to supporting pilots.
3305-02-21
Rivalry Triggers Conflict in Drevlyada
A long-standing personal rivalry between General Kendrick of the Namab Purple Brothers and Marshal Cooper of the Drevlyada League escalates into open conflict in the Drevlyada system.
